indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces are present for food preparation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no water source, no hard prep surfaces, no storage, and no cold storage. The space is designed for office work rather than cooking.
